children.text: Episode 009: Sergeant Bergdahl and President Trump

In this episode, Bob takes you along with him on his most recent trip to Texas.  We hear from Francis Johnshon's relatives, Ed, Johnnie Pryor, and Monica Bush.  Bob also reveals the biggest leap towards Ed's freedom that we've experienced to date.

Weirick discusses the recent ruling excluding evidence of service members being injured whilst searching for Bergdahl, the likely impact of President Trump on the trial, and some interesting Navy history.
